title: oritrophium figueirasii
intro: Oritrophium figueirasii, also known as Figueiras' flower or 'Giant Valerian', is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Oritrophium figueirasii include its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with this plant include reduced anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and relief from muscle spasms and pain. Oritrophium figueirasii is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other calming herbs like chamomile and lavender.
